songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day spends a 3rd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 39 sales units.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 65 streams units.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 233,289 total units.
